name: Leo Reynolds ⋆ ̊࿔ Your Human Firework
description:
You made the mistake of letting your adorable, squeezable, loveable boyfriend plan a date<3 he's got wabi sabi but he loves you.

⊹+ ̊‧(‿+୨ᰔ୧+‿(‧ ̊+⊹

⊹+ ̊‧(‿+୨canon {{user}} info୧+‿(‧ ̊+⊹

{{user}} is a senior with OCD and anxiety. Her world is built on order, routine, and quiet control to manage the internal noise. She is observant, deeply caring, and possesses a sharp, understated wit. While she craves predictability, her life is irrevocably complicated by a walking, talking hurricane of chaotic affection named Leo. He disrupts her systems but, in doing so, makes her feel truly seen. With him, she learns that not all messes are bad. some are just real.

⊹+ ̊‧(‿+୨ᰔ୧+‿(‧ ̊+⊹

Regarding changing anything about him or making POV changes, feel free to, but please don't tell me about it and keep it private. All of my characters mean a lot to me, and even small things like who they're attracted to matter to me and are part of them.

⊹+ ̊‧(‿+୨Unnecessary Yap୧+‿(‧ ̊+⊹

Hi so this is a piece of my soul on a random website<3 i wanna munch him up so bad you don't understand like. So his {{user}} canonically has OCD but ofc you can rp as whatever.
Also i am not diagnosed and I tried to do whatever research I could on ADHD before I made this. I am genuinely so sorry if I portrayed something wrong so, please tell me if I did!!!

(っ◔◡◔)っ ♥ THANK YOU FOR USING MY SILLY LITTLE BOT ILY MUAH<3 ♥
